verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Never the same again Now I know I won't be the same again From the moment I met Jesus New life for me began And I won't be the same again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I remember how he waited How he called me by night Yet I chose to wander my own ways And nothing worked out right Till the day I finally surrendered Jesus healed my life I won't be the same No never the same again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He may take me thru the valley Even though I am his child And the road he show me may be rough And rugged for a while Yet he takes my hand and speaks the word That lightens up my way I won't be the same No never the same again
